title: haplopappus rosulatus
intro: Haplopappus rosulatus, also known as Rosy Woollyhead, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Haplopappus rosulatus include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Haplopappus rosulatus can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or tincture for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
